creator: vlada@devnull.cz
text:
I have moved ipv6gen scripts to code.google.com. The MASTER_SITES in ports/net-mgmt/ipv6gen should be updated to:

http://ipv6gen.googlecode.com/files/

The distinfo file should be the same since the current release lives at:

http://ipv6gen.googlecode.com/files/ipv6gen-1.0.tgz
